div.p: Nodes exchange PING/PONG every Gossip_Interval ms (default: 500ms) to propagate topology and detect failures. Failure confirmed after NodeTimeout ms without pong (default: 15000ms).

g.text: 5 entries per PING: samples random nodes
T=500ms: B knows C (via A gossip)
T=1000ms: C knows A,B (full mesh converge)
